overall.description: A nighttime walk through an affluent suburban neighborhood in a video game (GTA V style), with the camera moving along wet asphalt streets lined with modern houses, stone walls, and landscaped hedges. Vehicles occasionally pass by as the camera navigates the curved residential roads under street lamp illumination.

tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark residential street with a tall ivy-covered stone wall on the left. The camera walks toward a modern house with warm lights glowing from its windows. A white convertible sports car passes by in the center of the frame, heading down the wet asphalt road.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the initial house into a section with a red brick wall on the left and tall hedges on the right. A silver sedan passes by on the wet asphalt. Street lamps become visible in the distance, illuminating the curved road ahead.

segments.scene_description: The road curves to the left, revealing a modern multi-story building with illuminated windows on the left and a white concrete wall on the right. The camera follows the curve as a dark sports car passes by. Street lamps provide pools of light on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: darker residential section with garage entrance and dense hedges

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a darker, more enclosed section of the street with a residential garage entrance visible on the left. Tall dark hedges line both sides of the road, creating a tunnel-like effect. The lighting becomes dimmer as the camera moves away from the street lamps toward a darker stretch of road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an affluent suburban neighborhood that shifts from open, brightly lit residential vistas to a dim, enclosed street corridor. It begins on a dark road beside a tall ivy-covered stone wall, moving toward a modern house with glowing windows as a white convertible sports car passes by on the wet asphalt. As the camera progresses, the ivy wall gives way to red brick and tall hedges, with a silver sedan crossing the frame while distant street lamps illuminate the curve ahead. The scene then opens up as the road bends left, revealing a multi-story building and a white concrete wall under pools of lamplight as a dark sports car speeds past. Finally, the environment narrows into a tunnel-like stretch of road lined with tall dark hedges and a residential garage, with the lighting dimming as the camera moves away from the street lamps.
